title: オークスの後に・最後のティアラヘ

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
And that's that for the Japanese Oaks! Man, that
was a blast!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon really brought in the energy again! I
can't wait for the Shuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I think she's got some new merchandise out. We
should go have a look!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With two-thirds of the Tiara tour under her belt,
Hishi Amazon is starting to become a household
name.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Woo, that was some one-on-one all right! That's the Oaks for you—all those racers out there were monsters!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hehe, thanks! But we're not done yet!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
That second crown is definitely going to Narita
Brian at the Japanese Derby next week. This is no
time to get complacent.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna give the Shuka Sho everything I've got,
so you'd better keep up with me, Teach!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time to kick our training up a notch for the
Shuka Sho!
